title: W. R. Berkley Corporation to Present at the Goldman Sachs 2022 US Financial Services Conference
text: GREENWICH, Conn.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--W. R. Berkley Corporation (NYSE: WRB) announced today that William R. Berkley, its executive chairman and W. Robert Berkley, Jr., its president and chief executive officer, will present at the Goldman Sachs 2022 US Financial Services Conference. The presentation will take place on Tuesday, December 6, 2022 at 8:00 a.m. eastern time.
